title: Behavior Sneeze
description: Allows the mob to stop and sneeze possibly startling nearby mobs and dropping an item.

drop_item_chance.description: Chance of dropping an item when sneezing.

entity_types.description: Entity types that can be targeted by the sneeze.

loot_table.description: Path to the loot table used to determine the dropped item.

prepare_sound.description: Sound played when the entity prepares to sneeze.

prepare_time.description: Time in seconds the entity prepares before sneezing.

sound.description: Sound played when the entity sneezes.

within_radius.description: Radius in blocks in which targets are considered.
